cards.name: Session memory
cards.what: The conversation itself, kept word for word while you chat.
cards.how: Every turn is re-sent to the model so the chat feels continuous. Press "end session" and it is compressed into one episodic summary, then wiped.
cards.hood: raw turns · token budget bar · replayed into every prompt

cards.name: Episodic memory
cards.what: Time-stamped records of what happened: who said what, and when.
cards.how: After every reply, the exchange is journaled as one event. When a new message resembles a past one, that episode gets recalled.
cards.hood: 1 episode per exchange · session consolidates into 1 summary

cards.name: Semantic memory
cards.what: Durable facts, preferences and skills distilled from what you say.
cards.how: An extraction pass mines each message for things worth keeping. Contradict yourself and the memory updates in place, keeping its history.
cards.hood: extract → dedupe → write · LLM in live mode, regex in demo

cards.name: Contextual memory
cards.what: Not a store: what retrieval just recalled for your last message, and why.
cards.how: Every memory is scored against your message; only the winners are injected into the prompt. Each card shows its score and matched words.
cards.hood: word overlap ÷ length + recency + reinforcement + importance

analytics.name: toolbox
analytics.what: 20+ free real-world tools (weather, Wikipedia, prices, translation...) plus your own MCP servers - a planner routes to them and an orchestrator card shows every call.

analytics.name: insights
analytics.what: Funnels, growth charts and a keyword map of everything in memory - audit the whole system at once.

analytics.name: full trace
analytics.what: A chip that replays that turn step by step: every retrieval score (rejects included), the exact prompt, every write.

analytics.name: prompt x-ray
analytics.what: The exact prompt the model received on the last turn, with the retrieved memories visible inside it.
